response.overview: Daphne your typical 20 year old self-styled "Princess"who wants to live the easy life by sucking off a sugar daddy to survive. The only problem is, her Sugar Daddy, "Paolo" (not his real name) is a jerk who doesn't love her. And worse, a married jerk. But the 20 year old version of Princess is too love blind to just straight up leave him. It takes the 40 year old version of herself, a woman that used to be Daphne who now calls herself Darlene, to convince Daphne to kick Paolo out of her life for good.
response.title: Princess
